list.descmd: Release publication of the 2022 CDC Clinical Practice Guideline for Prescribing Opioids Implementation Guide, version 2022.1.0

title: 2022 CDC Clinical Practice Guideline for Prescribing Opioids Implementation Guide
introduction: This implementation guide (IG) provides resources and discussion in support of applying the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) 2022 CDC Clinical Practice Guideline for Prescribing Opioids for Pain, including support for the all twelve (12) guideline recommendations
